visual_description: A man in a suit is leaning forward while riding a bicycle, gripping the handlebars with both hands. He is positioned outdoors on a road with trees and utility poles visible in the background under a partly cloudy sky. His gaze is directed forward, and his posture suggests active movement as he pedals.
